0)); font-size: 15px;">Homogeneous&nbsp;</font><div><font style="color: light-dark(transparent, rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 15px;">variance ?</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="145" x="250" y="403" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h7WrD1_aSKqITB9oBnm2-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#99CCFF);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>Student test for independent samples</b></font><div><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>- n &gt; 30 = Z-test</b></font></div><div><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>- n &lt; 30 = t-test</b></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="155" y="525" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h7WrD1_aSKqITB9oBnm2-5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#99CCFF);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>Student test with Welch correction</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="345" y="525" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h7WrD1_aSKqITB9oBnm2-6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#99CCFF);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>Wilcoxon-Mann-Whitney U test</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="535" y="525" as="geometry" /> 13px;">Histogram, qqplot</font></i></div><i><font style="font-size: 13px;">Shapiro test</font></i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="470" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell
